entities.name: SMALL-SCALE STORAGE INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Traditional water harvesting structures including check dams, farm bunds, and tanks used in semi-arid regions

entities.name: CHECK DAMS
entities.description: Small dams built across a stream to reduce flow and encourage groundwater recharge

entities.name: FARM BUNDS
entities.description: Earthen embankments constructed around fields to retain rainwater

entities.name: TANKS
entities.description: Small reservoirs used for storing rainwater

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Areas characterized by low annual precipitation and high evaporation rates

entities.name: WATER SECURITY
entities.description: The reliable access to an adequate quantity of acceptable quality water

entities.name: LANDSCAPE PRESERVATION
entities.description: The protection and maintenance of the natural physical features of a region

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient available water resources to meet demands

entities.name: GROUNDWATER RECHARGE
entities.description: The process where water moves downward from surface water to groundwater

entities.name: WATER RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of planning, developing, and managing water resources

entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL EFFECT
entities.description: The impact of interventions on the movement and distribution of water

entities.name: BASIN SCALE
entities.description: The spatial scale of a whole river basin used for hydrological analysis

entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL MODELLING
entities.description: The use of mathematical models to describe and predict water movement

entities.name: GWAVA WATER RESOURCES MODEL
entities.description: A specific version of the GlobalWater Availability Assessment model used to assess water balance

entities.name: WATER BALANCE
entities.description: The accounting of all water entering and leaving a system

entities.name: CAUVERY BASIN
entities.description: A major river basin in southern India

entities.name: SUB-CATCHMENTS
entities.description: Smaller drainage areas within a larger basin

entities.name: STREAMFLOW
entities.description: The flow of water in a stream or river

entities.name: EVAPORATION LOSSES
entities.description: Water lost from the surface to the atmosphere

entities.name: GROUNDWATER STORAGE
entities.description: The amount of water stored in aquifers
